content: Files and folders uploaded by admins will appeared here.

comment.text: This text appears in an empty folder view for a regular user, indicating that files and folders uploaded by administrators will be displayed there.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'appeared' was left untranslated in the Finnish text. It remains in English instead of being translated to Finnish.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Pääkäyttäjien lataamat tiedostot ja kansiot näkyvät tänne.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The English uses future tense ('will appeared') indicating files are not yet present but will appear later. The Armenian 'հայտնվել են' means 'have appeared' (past tense), implying they already arrived — the opposite meaning for an empty folder state.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Ադմինիստրատորների կողմից վերբեռնված ֆայլերը և թղթապանակները կհայտնվեն այստեղ:

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The English uses future tense ('will appear') but the Portuguese 'apareceram' is simple past tense ('appeared'). The translation changes the meaning from a future expectation to a past event.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Arquivos e pastas enviados por administradores aparecerão aqui.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Portuguese uses past tense 'apareceram' (appeared/have appeared) instead of future tense. The English says files 'will appear' here (future), but the translation states they already appeared (past), which is the opposite meaning in context.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Arquivos e pastas enviados por administradores aparecerão aqui.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'appeared' is left in English inside the Romanian sentence. The verb was not translated, making the sentence grammatically broken and the meaning unclear to a Romanian reader.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Fişierele şi folderele încărcate de administratori vor apărea aici.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'appeared' was left untranslated in English within the Serbian Cyrillic text.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Датотеке и фолдери отпремљени од стране администратора ће се појавити овде.
